allow: PowerShell($env:NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1; $p = Start-Process node -ArgumentList '--disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning','server.ts' -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput 'e:\\2026_2\\self-tool\\.srv.out' -RedirectStandardError 'e:\\2026_2\\self-tool\\.srv.err'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; "PID=$\($p.Id\)"; "--- health ---"; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:3500/api/health' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\).Content } catch { "health error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($ProgressPreference='SilentlyContinue'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "public/personalities" | Out-Null; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/8/80/Wikipedia-logo-v2.svg" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; Write-Output \("OK status=" + $r.StatusCode + " bytes=" + $r.RawContentLength\) } catch { Write-Output \("FAIL: " + $_.Exception.Message\) })
